tjhome 0.1.0
  • Reference
  • Changelog

Sensibo

Source: R/sensibo.R
sensibo.Rd

Sensibo is a device that allows control of air conditioning units.

API documentation is here.

sensibo_call(
  path,
  ...,
  query = list(),
  verb = "GET",
  api_key = Sys.getenv("SENSIBO_API_KEY")
)

sensibo_info()

sensibo_devices()

sensibo_maintain_fan_speed(
  device_id,
  cur_temp,
  min_temp,
  max_temp,
  curr_fan_speed,
  cool_fan_speed = "medium_low",
  norm_fan_speed = "medium",
  warm_fan_speed = "high"
)

sensibo_set_fan_speed(device_id, fan_speed)

sensibo_config()

sensibo_maintain_devices()

sensibo_historical_measurements(device_id, days = 1L)

Arguments

device_id

device ID from sensibo
cur_temp

current temperature reading
min_temp

minimum temperature allowed
max_temp

maximum temperature allowed
curr_fan_speed

current fan speed
cool_fan_speed

fan speed if the room is too cool
norm_fan_speed

fan speed if the room is within range
warm_fan_speed

fan speed if the room is too warm
fan_speed

fan speed string setting
days

number of days back to retrieve

Functions

  • sensibo_call: Generic API call

  • sensibo_info: Get all the data as a tibble

  • sensibo_devices: Parse sensibo information into usable format

  • sensibo_maintain_fan_speed: maintains the temperature by adjusting the fan speed

  • sensibo_set_fan_speed: Sets the fan speed of a sensibo device

  • sensibo_config: configuration for the maintenance job

  • sensibo_maintain_devices: maintains devices according to the configuration

  • sensibo_historical_measurements: fetch historical data

Contents

Developed by Troy James Palanca.
